# DocMirror 1.1.1

DocMirror 1.1.1 completes the intended post-seal-only plugin architecture.
The Core parse path is now independent of plugin discovery, plugin manifests,
licensing, editions, and business projection logic.

This is an owner-approved corrective patch for the 1.1.0 architecture. The
public Plugin API remains on projector-only API v2.

## Highlights

- One authoritative path carries `ParseRequest` and `ParsePolicy` through
  input acceptance, `AcceptedSource`, Dispatcher, Adapter, Canonical Pipeline,
  and `SealedParseResult`.
- All bundled Community, Enterprise, Finance, scenario, and third-party
  projectors use one Post-Seal `PluginRegistry`.
- The seven bundled domain directories remain substantive business
  projectors; they derive and validate edition JSON from an immutable sealed
  snapshot and cannot write facts back to Core.
- Core-owned classification, routing, OCR, layout, synonym, schema, and
  validation resources are separated from plugin-private projection
  resources.
- `plugin.yaml` is a post-seal projection manifest only.

## Corrected architecture

```text
CLI / REST API / Python SDK
  -> ParseRequest + ParsePolicy
  -> InputAcceptance + FCR
  -> AcceptedSource
  -> Dispatcher
  -> Adapter
  -> Canonical Pipeline
  -> SealedParseResult
  -> Post-Seal PluginRegistry
  -> Community / Enterprise / Finance / third-party projections
```

There is no `DomainRecognizer -> FactPatch -> Canonical` path and no
Community-specific registry.

## Compatibility

- The public `EditionProjector` and `PluginProvider` API v2 contracts are
  unchanged from 1.1.0.
- The Community schema, dataset names, row counts, record IDs, and business
  values are preserved for the mandatory 6+1 real-document matrix.
- Credit-report projections add explicit null normalized fields where a value
  is unavailable; they do not remove business values or records.

## Validation

- P0, P1, P2, clean architecture, import-linter, and Core contract gates pass.
- Seven real-document Core and Community projection Goldens pass at worker
  counts 1, 2, and 4.
- Automatic classification passes for all seven Golden domains without
  `doc_type_hint`.
- Plugin failure, timeout, absence, and external wheel lifecycle tests preserve
  the sealed fact fingerprint.
- The 77-page credit-report baseline completed with a 90.39-second p50,
  90.73-second p95, 866.99 MB peak RSS, and deterministic facts.

## Install

```bash
python -m pip install docmirror==1.1.1
```

## Verify

```bash
python -c "import docmirror; assert docmirror.__version__ == '1.1.1'; print(docmirror.__version__)"
docmirror --version
docmirror doctor
```

## Release integrity

- Git tag: `v1.1.1`
- Distribution: `docmirror==1.1.1`
- Source: the current `main` commit at release time
- Required gate: successful GitHub CI for the exact release commit
- Publishing: PyPI Trusted Publishing through the protected `pypi` environment

Private fixtures, parse outputs, temporary comparison worktrees, environment
files, and commercial packages are excluded from the public source commit and
wheel.

For the full change history, see the
[project changelog](https://github.com/valuemapglobal/DocMirror/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
